site.legalDescription: Lot 6, Montview Terrace, Map No. 004221, City of Escondido, County of San Diego, State of California
site.notes: ESCONDIDO INDEPENDENT CITY -- NOT governed by City of San Diego SDMC. All zoning refs are Escondido Municipal Code (EMC) Article 6. General Plan designation E2 (Estate Residential). Council District 4. Lot is trapezoidal/irregular -- lotWidth 164 ft and lotDepth 211 ft are bounding box estimates from GIS polygon, NOT surveyed dimensions; obtain parcel map from SDARCC for actual lot lines. Lot SF 23,962 is GIS-confirmed. Lot is conforming under RE-20 (min 20,000 SF). | TBD - A: legalDescription -- SDARCC recorder lookup by APN 236-411-06-00. yearBuilt ~1960 estimated from comparables -- confirm via SD County Assessor secured roll or ParcelQuest. | TBD - C: All zoning standards (FAR, height, setbacks) -- Escondido Municipal Code Article 6, RE-20 zone. City of Escondido Planning Dept (760) 839-4671. | TBD - D: TPA status unconfirmed -- likely NOT in TPA (no light rail proximity); verify via SANDAG GIS. CCHS does not apply (SD-specific overlay). No CCHS tier. | TBD - E: Fees -- City of Escondido Building Division fee schedule (NOT SD DSD). Impact fees per Escondido schedule. | TBD - F: Project type, architect, scope of work. | TBD - G: Inspector contacts -- City of Escondido Building Division (760) 839-4647. | TBD - H: Map rotation -- estimate from aerial. Parcel polygon irregular -- trace vertices from SD County GIS or Escondido parcel lookup (escondido.gov/209/Parcel-Lookup).

inspectors.val: City of Escondido Building Division — (760) 839-4647 | 24-hr inspection line: (760) 839-4646 | 201 N. Broadway, Escondido CA 92025 | Online: escondido.gov/1280 | Inspector hours: 8:00–8:30am or 4:00–5:00pm

inspectors.val: City of Escondido Building Division — (760) 839-4647 (same counter as combination)

inspectors.name: Grading / Civil
inspectors.val: City of Escondido Engineering Division — (760) 839-4671 | 201 N. Broadway, Escondido CA 92025

planningAreas.name: LAND USE DESIGNATION
planningAreas.val: Estate Residential (E-2) — confirmed current GP designation for RE-20 zone parcels. Source: EMC Article 6; GP Amendment Ord. 2025-01 (no rezoning of estate residential parcels).

planningAreas.name: TRANSIT PRIORITY AREA (TPA)
planningAreas.val: Not in TPA — ~2+ mi north of Escondido Transit Center (Sprinter terminus, 700 W Valley Pkwy); Sprinter runs 30-min frequency (below 15-min TPA threshold). Source: gonctd.com; SANDAG TPA dataset (2026-04-15).

planningAreas.name: PARKING STANDARDS (PSTPA)
planningAreas.val: Not in TPA — standard parking requirements apply per EMC Article 4.

planningAreas.name: ANIMAL OVERLAY (AO)
planningAreas.val: -- TBD: RE-20 permits animals by right; AO zone adds enhanced regs — verify via Escondido GIS or Planning Dept (760) 839-4671

overlayZones.name: VERY HIGH FIRE HAZARD
overlayZones.val: No — NoWildland per Escondido Fire GIS (prior confirmation). NOTE: CAL FIRE updated FHSZ map March 2025 expanded Very High coverage in Escondido hillside areas — re-verify at escondido.gov/209 (APN 236-411-06-00) with 2025 map. Source: Escondido Fire GIS; CAL FIRE Mar 2025 update.

overlayZones.name: FEMA FLOOD ZONE
overlayZones.val: Zone X -- minimal hazard (confirmed -- FEMA NFHL)

overlayZones.name: CCHS (HOUSING SOLUTIONS)
overlayZones.val: N/A -- City of San Diego overlay, does not apply to Escondido
